name: Southern Alberta Community Living Association
message: SACLA provides individualized services and supports aimed at assisting individuals with disabilities to achieve their personal goals. Established in 1980, the association focuses on building vibrant communities where every person is connected, contributing, and valued. Their services are tailored to the unique needs of each individual, beginning with a comprehensive consultation to determine the best approach for fostering quality of life and aspirations. SACLA also engages in projects like MyCompass and CATALYST to promote empowerment and address issues such as unemployment for marginalized groups.
